title: Gibson Graph Plugin - Requirements Document
response:
Feedback Summary (3 comments):

General Comments:
1. this should be called knowledge-graph plugin, and be live n ~/Code/ai/zero-day-ai/plugins

Specific Text Comments:
1. "#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a scan starts wi...": How is the graph plugin going to grab the data from a "normal scan"?
2. "1. WHEN Davinci service is unreachable THEN the sc...": The scan shouldnt exit; there should just be an error that the plugin cant send the scan data to davinci

comments.comment: How is the graph plugin going to grab the data from a "normal scan"?
comments.selectedText:
#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a scan starts with --graph flag THEN the plugin SHALL establish connection to configured Davinci service
2. WHEN a plugin generates conversation data THEN it SHALL immediately stream to Davinci within 100ms
3. WHEN multiple conversations occur THEN they SHALL be transmitted concurrently without blocking
4. WHEN network latency is high THEN transmission SHALL use buffering to maintain performance

comments.comment: The scan shouldnt exit; there should just be an error that the plugin cant send the scan data to davinci
comments.selectedText: 1. WHEN Davinci service is unreachable THEN the scan SHALL exit with clear error message

comments.comment: this should be called knowledge-graph plugin, and be live n ~/Code/ai/zero-day-ai/plugins
